text: VENUE

Tech up.

Go beyond.

Twin horn LED DRLs | Quad beam LED headlamps | LED turn indicators | Horizon LED positioning lamp Bold looks. Distinctive presence.

The all-new Hyundai VENUE has a personality that leaves quite an impression. The bold skid plates, muscular wheel arches, bold side cladding, and aerodynamic spoiler with LED high mounted stop lamp, announces its arrival even from a distance. An impression so strong, it stays with you.

Dark chrome radiator grille R16 (D=405.6 mm) Diamond cut alloy wheels Rear horizon LED tail lamp Bridge type roof rails Other features: Bold skid plate (Front & rear)   I   In-glass VENUE emblem   I   Aerodynamic spoiler with LED high mounted stop lamp   I   Signature C-pillar garnish
Dual 62.5 cm (12.3” + 12.3”) curved panoramic display New

Step in and fall in love.

Snuggle into the premium cabin of the all-new Hyundai VENUE and experience its opulent features like premium leather^^ armrest, D-cut steering wheel, coffee-table centre console, and terrazzo-textured crashpad finish as you navigate the adventure - laden terrains. The plush interior is the perfect blend of comfort and functionality.

Terrazzo-textured crashpad finish Coffee-table centre console with surround ambient lighting (Moon white) D-cut steering wheel New design power window controls Coloured inside door handles

^^Leatherette Dual tone (Dark navy & dove grey) interior theme Other features: Premium leather^^ armrest
Spacious cabin – Ample head room, shoulder room and knee room

Create your own story in comfort.

Dual tone leather^^ seats with VENUE branding Other features: Scooped front seatback   I   Rear seat armrest with cupholders   I   Magnetic pad   I   Glovebox cooling

*As per VDA 215 method ^^Leatherette New Spacious boot (375 litres)* 60:40 split rear seat 2-Step rear reclining seat Rear window sunshade Adventure is thrilling when it’s unplanned. It’s instinctive. And the all-new Hyundai VENUE has room to begin one, even at a moment’s notice. Travel with friends or solo, for just a drive or with no plans for U-turns. Let VENUE take you on a journey where you find yourself.

New

Experience a futuristic world from behind the wheels of the all-new Hyundai VENUE. The ccNC (Connected Car Navigation Cockpit) on board is meant to transform this SUV into a seamlessly connected driving experience, putting smart convenience and control at your fingertips.

It’s a tech mobile.

Accelerated by*

*31.24 cm (12.3”) ccNC navigation system is accelerated by NVIDIA

31.24 cm (12.3”) ccNC navigation system Quick control screen Split screen Wireless Android Auto and Apple CarPlay

31.24 cm (12.3”) Full digital display cluster Tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS) – highline ADAS safety system Turn by turn navigation Other features: Ambient sounds of nature
Dual 62.5 cm (12.3” + 12.3”) curved panoramic display

The all-new Hyundai VENUE is built for a world where every second matters. With unique features like Over - the - Air (OTA) updates, even critical system-level updates can be delivered remotely. Now things like enhancing the SUV’s performance or resolving other issues can be done at your convenience. In short, you have more time for adventures.

Designed for the connected era.

DCU - Data Connectivity Unit   I   CLU - Cluster   I   FATC - Fully Automatic Temperature Control  I   WPC - Wireless Power Charger ADAS_PRK ECU - Advanced Driver Assistance Systems Parking Electronic Control Unit  I   ISCM - Integrated Safety Control Module BDC - Body Domain Controller  I   CCU - Central Communication Unit  I   ESC - Electronic Stability Control  I ccNC - Connected Car Navigation Cockpit CCU ESC DCU CLU (12.3”) FATC WPC

ISCM BDC ccNC ADAS_PRK ECU New | up to 20 vehicle controllers

This SUV is packed with tech to take you beyond the ordinary. Front row ventilated seats, voice enabled smart electric sunroof, fully automatic temperature control system, Bose premium sound 8 speaker system and more. With cutting-edge technology by your side, the road ahead is yours to explore effortlessly.

Tech beyond expectations.

Bose premium sound 8 speaker system Front row ventilated seats Surround view monitor (SVM) Blind spot view monitor (BVM) New New New New Other features: Voice enabled smart electric sunroof   I   Electric 4-way driver seat   I   Wireless smartphone charger Smart key with push button start    I   JIOSaavn music streaming    I   More than 400 embedded voice recognition commands

Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Car (FCA-Car) & Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Lane Following Assist (LFA) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Junction Turning (FCA-JT) Leading Vehicle Departure Alert (LVDA) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Pedestrian (FCA-Ped) Lane Keeping Assist (LKA) Smart Cruise Control With Stop & Go (SCC with S&G) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Cycle (FCA-Cyl) Lane Departure Warning (LDW) High Beam Assist (HBA) The all-new Hyundai VENUE is equipped with Hyundai SmartSense Level 2 ADAS, offering 16 advanced safety features designed to empower your journey and protect you to go further with confidence.

ADAS Level 2 (16 features) New

The all-new Hyundai VENUE is engineered to help protect you and your loved ones on every journey. No matter whatever the destination, you can trust the VENUE to take you there safely.

Built to protect what’s precious.

33 Standard safety features More than 65 advanced safety features UHSS: Ultra high strength steel AHSS: Advanced high strength steel HSS: High strength steel 71% application (Hot stamping, UHSS, AHSS and HSS) New New New Super strong body structure FPAS – front parking sensors Hill-start assist control (HAC) Electronic parking brake (EPB) with Auto hold 6 Airbags standard All 4 disc brakes Tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS) – Highline Dashcam Other features: Emergency stop signal (ESS)   I    Burglar alarm   I    Child seat anchor (ISOFIX) Electronic stability control (ESC)   I    Vehicle stability management (VSM)

The new adventure-ready Hyundai VENUE is designed to amplify performance at every level. Choose from three powertrain options - 1.2 l Kappa, 1 l Kappa Turbo Petrol, and 1.5 l U2 CRDi Diesel. With three dynamic drive modes and three dedicated traction modes with paddle shifters, the VENUE can hold up multiple terrains.

Challenge every limit.

Kappa 1.2 l MPi petrol Kappa 1.0 l Turbo GDi petrol U2 1.5 l CRDi Diesel 6-Speed AT -New Max torque 114.7 Nm (11.7 kgm) @ 4 200 r/min Kappa 1.2 l MPi petrol Max power 61 kW (83 PS) @ 6 000 r/min Max torque 172 Nm (17.5 kgm) @ 1 500-4 000 r/min Kappa 1.0 l Turbo GDi petrol Max power

88.3 kW (120 PS) @ 6 000 r/min Max torque 250 Nm (25.5 kgm) @ 1 500-2 750 r/min U2 1.5 l CRDi diesel Max power 85 kW (116 PS) @ 4 000 r/min Traction control modes (Sand | Mud | Snow) Drive modes (Eco | Normal | Sport) Paddle shifters New

Other features: Black painted front radiator grille   I    Black skid plates   I    Black painted ORVMs   I    Exclusive Knight emblem Black steering wheel with matte black inserts and brass bezels

Introducing VENUE Knight.

The streets go quiet when the Hyundai VENUE Knight arrives. Sleek, silent, and unapologetically bold, it moves with a poise that commands attention. With blacked-out accents, exclusive Knight emblem, and a commanding stance, it dominates every curve and corner.

R16 (D = 405.6 mm) Black painted alloys with red brake calipers (Front and rear) Matte black Hyundai logo (Front & rear) Black painted bridge type roof rails Leather^ gear shift knob (Black with brass inserts) All black interiors with brass coloured inserts Exclusive black leather^ seat upholstery with brass coloured highlights

^Leatherette

*Terms & Conditions apply. For representation and information purposes only. Some of the equipment illustrated or described in this leaflet may not be supplied as standard equipment and may be available at extra cost. • Hyundai Motor India Limited reserves the right to change specifications and equipment without prior notice. Functionality of ccNC is dependent upon multiple factors including network availability etc. OTA updates will be available as per the discretion of HMIL. Functionality of Bluelink depends on adequate power supply and uninterrupted network connectivity to infotainment system. The Bluelink system is designed in such a way that it makes vehicle theft difficult if its circuit and battery connection is uninterrupted • Bluelink will be available on paid basis post the 3 year period. Hyundai SmartSense, the Advanced Driver Assistance System is not a substitute for safe and attentive driving. Its effectiveness depends on various factors.
